translation: From the Kanesh colony to the payment of our messengers every single day and night: A tablet has come to the City."
In the tablet of the City you wrote to me in the tablet of the City. This day whoever leaves the gold, Daur or Ewa, will take the colony of my colony.

In accordance with our letter, he gave either for an import duty to the palace, either for an import duty to the palace, or he gave an import duty to the palace, or he did not give anything to us. Let us write to me in the letter and send me word with our messenger.
I sent our tablets to every single or two or three times. He gave the silver either to the merchants. Let me send me word in the name of the man.
